operation: First, a horizontal cylinder is generated on the XZ workplane with a length of 70 units and radius of 11 units. Next, a vertical cylinder is created on the XY workplane with a length of 50 units and radius of 11 units, then translated 25 units along the positive Z-axis to align its base to the mid-height of the horizontal cylinder. Finally, a boolean union operation is performed to merge the two intersecting cylinders into a single monolithic part.
geometry: The model is a T-shaped monolithic solid formed by two perpendicular right circular cylinders of identical outer diameter. The longer cylinder runs horizontally, while the shorter cylinder extends vertically upward from the exact midpoint of the horizontal cylinder. The structure has three flat circular end faces of equal diameter, each oriented perpendicular to the axis of the cylinder segment it terminates.
function: This is an equal-diameter T-junction fitting, designed for use in piping, pneumatic, hydraulic, or structural assembly applications to connect three separate lines or rods at a 90-degree angle, providing a seamless, robust joint for flow redirection or structural load transfer.
